mapper.sql: select l.log_id, l.work_date, l.user_id, l.dept_id, l.call_count, l.valid_call_count, l.intent_customer_count, l.visit_count, l.signed_count, l.create_by, l.create_time, l.update_by, l.update_time, l.remark, u.user_name, d.dept_name from loan_work_log l left join sys_user u on l.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on l.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.delete:
delete from loan_work_log where log_id in
#{logId}
